title: Extract a multi-level component tree
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/dashboard_page_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.DashboardPageLive) that uses a 2-level component hierarchy: <.dashboard_layout> wrapping <.dashboard_card title="Users"> and <.dashboard_card title="Revenue">. Declare both function components in the same file (a helper module MyAppWeb.DashboardComponents with dashboard_layout/1 and dashboard_card/1). Each card takes :title (string, required) and an :inner_block slot.
tier_rationale: Two-level component extraction. Non-trivial decomposition decision.
